entries.name: adaptable
entries.definition: A Chaos Magic Governor adapts their leadership style to achieve results, embracing paradigm flexibility and innovative approaches while maintaining focus on practical outcomes and breakthrough solutions.

ethical_principles: Innovation in service of practical goals

related_concepts: Nothing is True, Everything is Permitted
